title: Inga pezizifera Benth.
author: MONRO, A. K.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Inga pezizifera  Benth.    (CR), Guabo, Guaba, Guaba de mono, Guabito (P).     Terrestrial trees. Distribution in PILA 0–1000 m, low elevation mixed forest, mixed forest in transition to low elevation forest. Global distribution: Nicaragua to Brazil. Records:  A. Chacón 292  (CR, MO). Uses: Firewood.
